Promise.CanonicalStatement: [The ONE sentence that captures the transformation promise] Example: "Restore youthful energy and mental clarity in 30 days without stimulants or side effects"

ForbiddenAlterations.Rule: Never change timeframe (30 days is locked)

Mechanism.Name: [The proprietary "how" - system/ingredient/method name]
Mechanism.CanonicalParagraph: [The ONE paragraph that explains the mechanism consistently] Example: "Unlike stimulants that burn out your adrenals, [MECHANISM_NAME] works by supporting your mitochondria—the cellular 'power plants' that produce 90% of your body's energy. Clinical research shows this natural compound helps restore mitochondrial function that declines with age, giving you sustained energy without the crash."

KeyPoints.Point: Targets root cause (mitochondrial decline), not symptoms

Pillar.CanonicalLanguage: "Multiple peer-reviewed studies show [COMPOUND] supports healthy mitochondrial function"
"Developed by Dr. [NAME], board-certified [SPECIALTY] with 20+ years researching cellular energy"
"Over 10,000 customers have experienced the benefits of [PRODUCT]"

Objection.Statement: "I've tried other energy supplements and they didn't work"

Rebuttal.CanonicalLanguage: "Most energy supplements rely on stimulants (caffeine, guarana) that mask the problem. [PRODUCT] is different—it addresses the root cause by supporting your mitochondria, the actual energy producers in your cells."

Objection.Statement: "How do I know this will work for me?"

Rebuttal.CanonicalLanguage: "We offer a 60-day money-back guarantee. If you don't experience noticeable improvement in energy and clarity, return it for a full refund. And you're not alone—over 10,000 customers have already experienced the benefits."

Objection.Statement: "Is it safe? Will there be side effects?"

Rebuttal.CanonicalLanguage: "[PRODUCT] contains naturally-sourced ingredients that have been studied in clinical trials. It's non-stimulant, so there's no jittery feeling or crash. As always, consult your doctor if you have specific health concerns."

CallToAction.CanonicalPhrasing: [The ONE CTA phrasing that's proven/tested] Example: "Click below to try [PRODUCT] risk-free today"

Urgency.IfUsed: [Only if real - limited inventory, promo end date]

CrossAssetAlignment.Rule: All assets (sales page, emails, ads) must use CanonicalStatement verbatim at least once
Mechanism CanonicalParagraph can be shortened but core logic cannot change
ProofPillars must appear in same order (Science → Testimonials → Authority → Results)
Objections must be addressed before final CTA
